action: Model contradictions and state-layer divergence as linked provenance records rather than overwriting earlier observations.

progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical committed source and test contents

claim_states.observed: Canonical queue state and append-only candidate updates are separate repository layers.
claim_states.inferred: Contradiction records without independent references or preservation rules can conceal unsupported reconciliation.
claim_states.proposed: Run the validator before accepting contradiction-ledger changes and during reviewed queue compaction.
claim_states.superseded: No repository history or prior continuity record was removed.
claim_states.unresolved: M-002 has not yet been promoted into the canonical ACTIVE_QUEUE.json through reviewed compaction.

privacy_boundary: Public repository files and commit metadata only; private chat, health information, credentials, identifying personal data, and unreviewed uploads excluded.
handoff: Next continuity slice should build a deterministic compaction manifest that enumerates baseline digest, accepted candidate updates, rejected or deferred updates, and resulting canonical digest without mutating the queue during validation.
